props.name: patternSize
props.description: Defines the size of the grain pattern.

props.name: patternScaleX
props.description: Scaling factor for the X-axis of the grain pattern.

props.name: patternScaleY
props.description: Scaling factor for the Y-axis of the grain pattern.

props.name: patternRefreshInterval
props.description: Number of frames before the grain pattern refreshes.
